name: spark-telegram-bot
description: Spark Telegram ingress gateway for Builder and Spawner

scripts.build:sync: npm run build && npm run sync:runtime
scripts.test: ts-node tests/launchMode.test.ts && ts-node tests/buildIntent.test.ts && ts-node tests/buildE2E.test.ts && ts-node tests/conversationIntent.test.ts && ts-node tests/conversationFrame.test.ts && ts-node tests/conversationMemory.test.ts && ts-node tests/accessPolicy.test.ts && ts-node tests/providerRouting.test.ts && ts-node tests/modelSwitch.test.ts && ts-node tests/missionRelayFormatting.test.ts && ts-node tests/outboundSanitize.test.ts && ts-node tests/redaction.test.ts && ts-node tests/errorExplain.test.ts && ts-node tests/spawner.test.ts && ts-node tests/timeoutConfig.test.ts && ts-node tests/localWorkspace.test.ts && ts-node tests/llmProvider.test.ts && ts-node tests/healthPolling.test.ts && ts-node tests/diagnose.test.ts && ts-node tests/builderBridge.test.ts && ts-node tests/pythonCommand.test.ts && ts-node tests/hiddenProcess.test.ts
